ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year when the university was established */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university (e.g., public, private, research, etc.) */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being ranked */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the university */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Global ranking position of the university */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National ranking position of the university */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking position from the previous year */,
  "rank_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., QS, Times Higher Education, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall ranking */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, ratio, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the metric value applies to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "rank_impact" REAL /* Impact of the metric on the university's overall ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric value (e.g., survey, publication, etc.) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, university admin, public user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the university ranking */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the university ranking was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier for the user session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which university rankings are available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
